text: Wealthy individuals should pay significantly higher taxes than middle-class earners.
A free market economy, with minimal government interference, best serves the public interest.
The government should nationalize key industries such as energy and transportation.
Corporate tax rates should be reduced to stimulate economic growth and job creation.
The minimum wage should be raised substantially to ensure a living wage for all workers.
Trade unions are harmful to economic competitiveness and should have reduced powers.
Universal basic income should be implemented to reduce poverty and inequality.
Government debt and deficit spending should be aggressively reduced through spending cuts.
Inheritance taxes should be significantly increased to reduce intergenerational wealth transfer.
Privatization of public services leads to more efficient and effective delivery.
A wealth tax on billionaires would help fund public services without harming economic growth.
Reducing regulations on businesses is the most effective way to boost economic growth.
Same-sex marriage should be legally recognized and protected in all jurisdictions.
Traditional family structures are the foundation of a healthy society and should be promoted.
Abortion should be legal and accessible without significant restrictions.
Abortion should be banned or severely restricted in most circumstances.
Comprehensive sex education should be mandatory in public schools.
Religious values and traditions should have a greater role in shaping public policy.
Transgender individuals should have the right to use bathrooms and facilities matching their gender identity.
Drug use should be decriminalized and treated as a public health issue rather than a criminal one.
Stricter enforcement of drug laws is essential to maintaining public order and safety.
Capital punishment is an unjust practice that should be abolished.
The death penalty is a necessary deterrent for the most serious crimes.
Affirmative action programs are necessary to address historical discrimination.
Urgent government action, including carbon taxes and emissions regulations, is needed to address climate change.
Climate change regulations harm the economy and should be minimized to protect jobs.
Subsidies for fossil fuel industries should be eliminated and redirected to renewables.
Nuclear energy should be expanded as a clean and reliable energy source.
Environmental regulations should be strengthened even if this increases costs for businesses.
Economic development should take priority over environmental protection when the two conflict.
Greater government transparency and stronger whistleblower protections are essential for democracy.
National security requirements sometimes justify government secrecy and surveillance.
Campaign finance should be strictly regulated to reduce the influence of money in politics.
Voter ID requirements are a reasonable measure to prevent election fraud.
Gerrymandering and electoral manipulation undermine democracy and must be actively prevented.
Strong executive power is sometimes necessary to effectively govern a complex modern state.
Large technology companies should be broken up or heavily regulated as monopolies.
Government regulation of technology companies stifles innovation and should be minimized.
Robust data privacy laws are needed to protect citizens from corporate data exploitation.
Artificial intelligence development should prioritize economic competitiveness over strict safety regulations.
Net neutrality should be mandated to ensure equal access to the internet.
AI safety regulations could slow down technological progress and should be kept minimal.
Immigration levels should be significantly increased to address labor shortages and boost economic growth.
Immigration levels should be significantly reduced to protect jobs and national culture.
Undocumented immigrants who have lived peacefully in a country for many years should have a path to citizenship.
Strict border enforcement and deportation of undocumented immigrants is necessary for national security.
Countries have a moral obligation to accept refugees fleeing violence and persecution.
National sovereignty should take precedence over international obligations regarding refugee acceptance.
Universal healthcare is a fundamental right and should be provided by the government.
Healthcare is best delivered through private markets with minimal government involvement.
Prescription drug prices should be regulated by the government to ensure affordability.
Mental health services should receive the same level of funding and insurance coverage as physical health.
Government mandates for vaccines are an unacceptable intrusion on personal freedom.
Public health programs like mandatory vaccination are justified to protect community health.
Military spending should be significantly reduced and resources redirected to domestic priorities.
A strong military is essential for national security and should be well-funded.
International institutions like the United Nations should have more authority in resolving conflicts.
Nations should prioritize their own interests over multilateral agreements and international institutions.
Foreign aid should be significantly increased to address global poverty and instability.
Foreign aid is an ineffective use of taxpayer money and should be substantially reduced.
Trade agreements that prioritize worker protections and environmental standards should replace purely economic deals.
Free trade agreements, even if imperfect, create more prosperity than protectionism.
Public investment in infrastructure and green energy creates more jobs than tax cuts for the wealthy.
Low and flat taxes encourage entrepreneurship and economic dynamism more effectively than progressive taxation.
The power of the federal government should be reduced and authority returned to states and local communities.
A strong central government is needed to ensure equal rights and services for all citizens across regions.
Systemic racism is a real and ongoing problem that requires active policy responses.
Focusing on group identity and systemic oppression is divisive and distracts from individual opportunity.
Oil and gas exploration in protected natural areas should be prohibited regardless of economic benefits.
Responsible development of natural resources, including drilling in some protected areas, can coexist with conservation.
Social media platforms should be held legally responsible for harmful content posted by their users.
Content moderation by tech platforms is censorship and violates free speech principles.
Government-funded childcare and parental leave programs are essential investments in human capital.
Parents should bear primary responsibility for childcare costs without heavy government subsidies.
English or the national language should be declared the official language and government services in other languages reduced.
Multilingualism should be celebrated and government services provided in multiple languages to serve all residents.
Gun ownership should be heavily regulated to reduce gun violence, including mandatory background checks and bans on assault weapons.
The right to bear arms is a fundamental constitutional right that should not be restricted.
Economic sanctions are a legitimate tool to promote human rights and democracy abroad.
Engaging in trade and diplomacy with authoritarian regimes, even if imperfect, produces better outcomes than isolation.
